message.minecad.sketch_tool.no_plane: Set a sketch plane with the Plane tool first.
message.minecad.sketch_tool.axis_mismatc: Vertex must use the same %s coordinate: %s.
message.minecad.sketch_tool.raycast_miss: No active sketch plane under the cursor.
tooltip.minecad.plane: Click a block face to set the sketch plane.
tooltip.minecad.sketch_tool: Click the active sketch plane to add polygon vertices.
tooltip.minecad.box_tool: Click two corners on the active sketch plane.
tooltip.minecad.circle_tool: Click center, then radius on the active sketch plane.
